title: Happy Baby Club Blue Silicone Baby Feeding Set - Complete Baby Weaning Set for Expecting Moms and New Parents | Gift Set for Family and Friends | Including a Bib, Bowl, Plate, Cup, Spoon and Fork
features: 💎 PREMIUM MATERIALS — Made from high-quality, food-grade silicone and bamboo, making them safe, non-toxic, and easy to clean.
🍱 COMPLETE SET — Includes a range of high-quality, durable tableware items that comes in a complete set table meal, starting from the plate until the spoon, and cup lid.
⛄ BABY FRIENDLY DESIGN — Designed in cute baby-themed design to encourage your little ones to self-feed and gain independence. Making meal times more enjoyable for both parent and child
👶 PERFECT BABY GIFT — Comes in a beautifully designed gift box, making it the perfect gift for new parents or for a newborn child, whether it's for your friends or even your family.

100% Food-Grade Silicone: Made from the highest quality food-grade silicone, our feeding set is safe, non-toxic, and free from BPA, PVC, phthalates, and other harmful chemicals. You can trust that your baby is using safe and healthy feeding products.
Unbreakable & Durable: Built to withstand the rigors of daily use, this set is unbreakable and durable, ensuring it lasts through the toddler years.
Encourages Independence: The ergonomic design and easy-to-grip handles help your baby develop self-feeding skills and independence.
description: Make meal times more enjoyable for both parent and child with the Baby Feeding Set! 🔍 PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS: Handmade Eco-friendly Materials, FDA Approved, BPA Free Dishwasher Safe, Microwave Safe, Freezer Safe and Oven Safe. Silicone Set Includes: ➔ 1x Silicone Bib ➔ 1x Silicone Bowl ➔ 1x Silicone Plate ➔ 1x Silicone Cup with straw lid ➔ 1x Snack cup lid ➔ 1x Training fork and spoon ➔ 1x Bamboo Spoon ✨ ✅ PURCHASE INCLUDES — 1x Silicone Baby Feeding Set Our feeding set is perfect for baby-led weaning. The suction bases on the plate and bowl keep them secure, reducing spills and making self-feeding easier. The soft, silicone material is gentle on your baby’s gums and teeth, and the ergonomic design ensures your little one can comfortably hold and use the cutlery. Why Choose Our Silicone Feeding Set? Ideal Baby Shower Gift: Thoughtfully packaged and suitable for both boys and girls, this set is the perfect gift for new parents. Safe and Non-Toxic: Rest assured your baby is using the safest materials. Convenient and Practical: Designed for real-life parenting, this set makes feeding simpler and cleaner. Make Mealtime Fun and Safe for Your Baby: With our Complete Baby Silicone Feeding Set, introduce your little one to solid foods safely and comfortably. Whether for baby weaning or everyday meals, this set has everything you need. Get yours today and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with knowing your baby is using the best feeding products available.
